task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Bookmark Manager** (Level 4)

Build a CRUD API for bookmarks. Each bookmark has: url (required, must be a URL), title (required), tags (text). POST /api/bookmarks creates, GET /api/bookmarks lists all, DELETE /api/bookmarks/:id removes. Validate that url is actually a URL format.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Bookmarks table:
  url, required
  title, required
  tags

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Bookmarks table:
  url, required
  title, required
  tags

when user sends bookmark to /api/bookmarks:
  validate bookmark:
    url must not be empty
    title must not be empty
  url_valid = bookmark's url contains 'http://' or bookmark's url contains 'https://'
  guard url_valid or 'Invalid URL format'
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/bookmarks:
  send back all Bookmarks

when user calls DELETE /api/bookmarks/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Bookmarks with this id
  send back 'deleted'

test 'POST with valid bookmark':
  call POST /api/bookmarks sending url: 'https://example.com', title: 'Example'
  expect response status is 201
  expect response has id
  expect response has url
  expect response has title

test 'POST with invalid URL':
  call POST /api/bookmarks sending url: 'not-a-url', title: 'Bad'
  expect response status is 400

test 'GET all bookmarks':
  call GET /api/bookmarks
  expect response status is 200

test 'POST without URL':
  call POST /api/bookmarks sending title: 'No URL'
  expect response status is 400
